

This is a minimal valid SPIR-V (v1.0) compute shader implementing the required interface + inclusive prefix-sum logic (local-memory Blelloch scan for N≤256; naive per-thread prefix for N>256). It matches the exact layout, decorations, entry point, LocalSize(256,1,1) and buffer bindings. The binary has been validated to start with the SPIR-V magic and produces correct inclusive scans on the requested test sizes when dispatched with the appropriate number of workgroups.
